journey.title: How a Personalized Story Is Created
journey.subtitle: A gentle journey that starts with your child – and ends with a story you'll want to read together again and again

step1.caption:
Choose a story that begins with the emotion your child is feeling right now.
Small, gentle, and tailored to what they're going through at this moment.

step2.caption:
Your child becomes the heart of the story,
with a presence that feels natural, close, and familiar.

step3.caption:
Delicate, sensitive, and precise personalization,
one that respects the child's inner world.

step4.caption:
A story that truly feels like theirs,
one they'll want to return to again and again.

personalized.title: Personalized Experience
personalized.text: The story is created especially for your child, in a calm and supportive language.

instructions.recommendation: Recommendation: Find a quiet and pleasant place for shared reading 💫

personalize.alreadyStarted: You've started personalizing this story. What would you like to do?
personalize.whatToDo: What would you like to do?
personalize.childName: This name will appear in the story
personalize.nameMaxLength: Name must be at most 30 characters
personalize.nameScriptMismatchWarning: The entered name uses a different language/script than the story. This may look less natural in the final story.
personalize.nameMinLength: Name must contain at least 2 characters
personalize.photoUsage: We'll only use it to create personalized illustrations
personalize.selectPhoto: Select a clear photo of the child
personalize.photoRequired: Please upload a photo to continue
personalize.affectsIllustrations: This will affect how the illustrations look throughout the book
personalize.fillAllFields: Please fill in all required fields before finishing
personalize.imageTooLarge: Image is too large. Please select an image smaller than 5MB
personalize.nameSub: Their name will be woven through every line — making this story entirely, unmistakably theirs.
personalize.previewSentenceSuffix: looked up at the night sky — and for a moment, every star seemed to shine just for them.
personalize.previewSentenceEmpty: Once upon a time, there was a child who believed in the magic of stories…
personalize.genderSub: So every word feels natural — she, her, hers / he, him, his. No detail left generic.
personalize.photoSub: {name}'s face will appear in the first illustrated spreads — not a generic child, but them.
personalize.uploadHint:
JPG or PNG · Max 5 MB
Used only to create illustrations
personalize.styleSub: Every page will be rendered in this mood. Pick the world you want {name} to step into.
personalize.celebrateSub: Every word, every illustration — made for {name}. Get ready for something truly special.

storyDetail.notFoundMessage: This story may have been removed or the link is invalid.
storyDetail.emotionalSubtitleTemplate: A personalized therapeutic story that helps children understand and cope with {topic}
storyDetail.emotionalSubtitleDefault: A personalized therapeutic story that accompanies your child through their most meaningful moments
storyDetail.descriptionTemplate: A warm and touching story written especially to help children ages {age} cope with {topic}. Through relatable characters and gentle language, the story guides your child through a safe experience of understanding, emotional processing, and growth.
storyDetail.descriptionDefault: A warm and touching story written especially for your child. Through relatable characters and gentle language, the story guides your child through a safe experience of understanding, emotional processing, and growth.

features.title: What's Included
features.childImage: Child's image included in story illustrations

accordion.howPersonalizedContent: Your child's name and visual identity are integrated into the story. Personalization happens in the next step, after you click "Personalize This Story". You'll be able to see a preview before purchasing.
accordion.whatAboutTemplate: The story addresses {topic} and guides your child through a process of understanding, acceptance, and emotional growth. It's written in warm, soothing language appropriate for their age.
accordion.whatAboutDefault: The story guides your child through a process of understanding, acceptance, and emotional growth. It's written in warm, soothing language appropriate for their age.
accordion.whoForTemplate: This story is designed for children ages {age} who are experiencing {topic}. It's ideal for parents, therapists, and educators looking for a warm, accessible tool for emotional work with children.
accordion.whoForDefault: This story is designed for children and their parents. It's ideal for parents, therapists, and educators looking for a warm, accessible tool for emotional work with children.
accordion.sizeQualityContent: The story is available in a high-quality digital format suitable for viewing on tablets, phones, and computers. A premium hardcover print option is coming soon.

v2.trustTherapistBody: Every story is written and reviewed by licensed child therapists using evidence-based CBT methods.
v2.trustSafeBody: Your child's data and photo are used only to personalize their story and never shared.
v2.trustPreviewBody: See two real spreads of the story before committing. No surprises, no pressure.
v2.trustGuaranteeBody: If the story doesn't feel right, we'll make it right — full refund within 30 days.
v2.faqPersonalizationBody: You enter your child's name and gender, and optionally upload a photo. You'll get two free preview spreads with placeholders replaced. When you're ready, unlock the full personalized story for {price}.
v2.faqEmotionalQ: What emotional challenge does this story address?
v2.faqEmotionalBodyTopic: This story focuses on {topic} for children ages {age}. It uses age-appropriate language and CBT-informed techniques to support your child.
v2.faqEmotionalBodyFallback: This story uses age-appropriate language and CBT-informed techniques to support your child through everyday emotional challenges.
v2.faqReceiveQ: What do I actually receive after purchase?
v2.faqReceiveBody: You receive the full 8-spread story in our digital reader, a PDF download, and lifetime access to your copy.
v2.faqWhoWroteBody: Each story is written by child-development specialists, reviewed by licensed child psychologists, and aligned with cognitive-behavioral therapy principles.

previewSpreadsNote: Two free non-personalized spreads. Your child's name and photo will replace the placeholders once you personalize.
readyToPutChildInStory: Ready to put your child in this story?
personalizeBeforeBuy: Personalize with their name, gender, and photo — before you buy.

preview.genericVersionNote: Read 2 free spreads before personalizing. No account needed.
preview.childNameHint: This text will feature your child's name
preview.bridgeTitle: Ready to make it about your child?
preview.bridgeSub: Step 2 — Add their name, gender, and photo

faq.title: Common questions
faq.a1: You enter your child's name, gender, and optionally upload a photo. You see a free 2-spread preview before any payment — then unlock the full story for a one-time fee.
faq.a2: This story uses warm, age-appropriate language to help your child understand feelings and build confidence.
faq.a3: It's designed for young children and the adults who read with them — parents, caregivers, and educators.
faq.a4: Digital editions are high resolution. Printed options, when available, use quality materials suitable for children's books.
